description_long: This is a modern, articulated city bus with a rectangular, streamlined body and a predominantly white and blue color scheme. The front features a large, dark windshield with the word 'HÍBRIDO' displayed above, indicating it is a hybrid vehicle, and stylized headlights at the lower corners. Both sides of the bus have large, tinted rectangular windows arranged in a row, with the branding 'MOVI' and additional text, as well as two sets of passenger doors visible on the right side. The rear is plain with minimal detailing, including taillights and a small area with technical markings. The bus rides on four visible wheels, two on each side, and the overall design is clean and functional, suitable for urban public transportation. The roof is flat and unadorned, and the bus appears to be constructed primarily from metal and glass, with rubber tires.
description: A modern white and blue hybrid city bus with large tinted windows, 'MOVI' branding, and two passenger doors on the right side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large windshield, 'HÍBRIDO' sign, and stylized headlights.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the 'MOVI' branding, two passenger doors, and a row of large tinted windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal detailing, taillights, and technical markings.
description_view_3: Left side view with 'MOVI' branding and a continuous row of large tinted windows, but no visible passenger doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: Six large, rectangular, evenly spaced tinted windows on each side, separated by vertical pillars; windows are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: 'MOVI' branding in white and blue on both sides, with no distinct manufacturer logo visible.
